dataSource.measure: teams: second-bucketed chain cumulative 1 - product(1 - p); attackers: player-chain cumulative 1 - product(1 - p)

gifs.caption: A cutback to Trent Alexander-Arnold creates the game-winning chance.
Harvey Elliott dribbles inside and curls the winner past three defenders.
Mohamed Salah dribbles inside and curls in a low-angle finish.
Jeremy Doku cuts inside and scores.
